sourceMovie.title: Blindness
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Blindness works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Maze Runner
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Blindness clicked for you, The Maze Runner (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in mystery and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Blindness?
faq.answer: Try The Maze Runner, I Am Legend, Contagion—each shares DNA with Blindness while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Blindness?
faq.answer: Blindness (2008) is best described as Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Blindness worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
